description: Designed for utmost comfort, this pair of sneakers from fila have all that the feet require. With cushioned uppers and multi-directional pattern on the outsole, this pair offers ample comfort and stability. This white pair comes from the Bruno range of fila. Pair them with casual wear like jeans or cargo pants and spend the summer in the glory of comfort in style.Uppers Synthetic leather uppers with perforated panels and blue and red detailing for breath ability, support and durability White lace-ups for a snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for added comfort Midsole Breathable EVA footbed for cushioning and shock resistance Phylon cushioned footbed Outsole Blue outsole with herringbone pattern for greater grip Pivot point for ease in movement Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
